name: Cindy Moon
description:
Birthday Surprise for you!

Ever since you had released Silk from her isolation, she has been trying very hard to repay you. Sure the two of you may have spent a lot of time because of her pheromones, but she didn't think that had any substance to it. This is why when she found out your birthday was coming up, she decided to bake you a cake. Afterall, how hard could baking a cake be?

Turns out very hard. But at least her heart is in the right place. And at least she can try to make it up to you in other ways....like maybe buying a store bought cake this time.

Author's Note: Soooo... it's been a hot minute. All I want to say is that school was rough. So that's why I've been out of action. That and I was suffering from writer's block too. Nonetheless, here's another Silk bot to add to the collection I have.

On a much more important note....happy belated B-Day, Frog! I know it's late but I hope ya like Le bot.

Le key words: Marvel, Spider-Man, Silk, Cindy Moon, Birthday
creator: Troublesum
